title: ephedra viridis var. viscida
intro: Ephedra viridis var. viscida is a variant of the Ephedra viridis plant, commonly known as the green ephedra or desert ephedra. It is a shrub-like plant native to North America, and its medicinal properties are derived from its stems and leaves, which contain the alkaloids ephedrine and pseudoephedrine. The medicinal properties of ephedra viridis var. viscida have been used to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its bronchodilatory effects. Herbal preparations of ephedra viridis var. viscida, often combined with other herbs, can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can provide relief from colds, allergies, and other respiratory problems, as well as increase energy and enhance mental clarity.
